prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次约11919→12603→9828→10251→8285，整体呈波动趋势。2023年大幅前移至9828，2024年小幅后移至10251，2025年进一步前移 至8285（近5年最佳），2025年基准约8285名；本省理科（物理类）计划2021年24人、2022年26人、2023年24人、2024年29人、2025年32人，呈逐年扩招趋势；2 026年计划36人，较2025年增加4人（扩招约12.5%），扩招使竞争略有加剧，位次数字趋于增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科2026年主榜约第80名， 近年排名稳中有升（2021年82→2026年80），学校层次在211中属中上水平；2026年声誉评价偏负面（涉及学术不端事件通报）；抖音热度一般（总排名第77）；2025年投档异常信号为低关注（热门专业投档线暴跌），整体报考热度略有降温；管理科学与工程为A级学科（第五轮评估），是该校唯一A级学科；机械工程、 电气工程等工科专业依托校本部实力，在行业内认可度较高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信、计算机类等专业社会热度高热推荐，软件工程持续 偏热；机械/智能制造分化观望。本省2026年普通高考总人数约167000人，较2025年物理类+历史类合计172114人略有减少，竞争压力略缓；学校位于安徽省宣城市，非本省高校，无本地招生倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次前移至近5年最佳（8285名）、2026年计划扩招12.5%使位次后移压力增大、学校声誉偏负面及抖音热度一般使报考热度略有降温、本 省考生总数略减等因素，预测2026年最低位次约8876名，区间8376–9376名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 11919 → 12603 → 9828 → 10251 → 8285, showing a fluctuating trend. In 2023, it moved significantly forward to 9828, in 2024 it slightly moved back to 10251, and in 2025 it further moved forward to 8285 (best in the past 5 years). The baseline for 2025 is about 8285. The provincial science (physics category) enrollment plan was 24 in 2021, 26 in 2022, 24 in 2023, 29 in 2024, and 32 in 2025, showing a gradual expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 36, an increase of 4 from 2025 (expansion of about 12.5%), which slightly intensifies competition and tends to increase the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science 2026 main ranking about 80th, with stable improvement in recent years (82 in 2021 → 80 in 2026). The school level is upper-middle among 211 universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (involving reports of academic misconduct). Douyin popularity is average (overall ranking 77th). The 2025 admission abnormal signal is low attention (hot majors' admission scores plummeted), indicating a slight cooling of overall application enthusiasm. Management Science and Engineering is an A-level discipline (fifth round evaluation), the only A-level discipline at this university. Engineering majors such as Mechanical Engineering and Electrical Engineering rely on the strength of the main campus and have high recognition in the industry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication, and Computer Science are highly recommended with high social popularity. Software Engineering continues to be relatively hot. Mechanical/Intelligent Manufacturing is divided and wait-and-see. The total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in the province in 2026 is about 167,000, slightly less than the total of 172,114 for physics and history categories in 2025, easing competition pressure. The school is located in Xuancheng City, Anhui Province, not a local university, so there is no local enrollment preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 ranking moving forward to the best in the past 5 years (8285), the 2026 plan expansion of 12.5% increasing pressure for ranking to move back, the slightly negative school reputation and average Douyin popularity cooling application enthusiasm, and a slight decrease in the total number of candidates in the province, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 8876, with a range of 8376–9376.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 8876, range 8376–9376. It is recommended that candidates with rankings in the upper part of the range (about within 8600) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors such as Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control and Software Engineering; candidates with rankings in the middle part of the range (about 8600–9100) should mainly target Tier 2 majors such as Mechanical Engineering and New Energy Materials and Devices; candidates with rankings in the lower part of the range (about beyond 9100) should secure admission with Tier 3 majors, among which Logistics Management, relying on the background of the main campus's A-level discipline of Management Science and Engineering, offers high cost-effectiveness.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 1866 → 1821 → 2795 → 2733 → 2735. Rankings were stable around 1800 in 2021–2022, significantly dropped to 2795 in 2023, stabilized near 2730 in 2024–2025, and overall shifted backward by about 900 places in the last three years. The 2025 baseline is about 2735. The provincial liberal arts (history category) enrollment plan was 4 in 2021, 6 in 2022, 6 in 2023, 6 in 2024, and 4 in 2025, with minor fluctuations. 2026 enrollment plan.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 80th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable or slightly rising rankings in recent years, placing it at an upper-middle level among 211 universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (involving reports of academic misconduct incidents). Douyin popularity is average (overall ranking 77th). The 2025 admission abnormal signal is low attention, indicating a slight cooling in overall application enthusiasm. Management Science and Engineering is an A-level discipline (fifth round evaluation), but the university's liberal arts majors (Network and New Media, Law, English) have low correlation with its advantageous engineering disciplines, and discipline evaluation data for liberal arts majors are missing.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Network and New Media major has a clear social discouragement trend (journalism and communication category overall discouraged); Law is in a wait-and-see state; Foreign Languages generally in a wait-and-see state. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province is about 167,000, slightly down from the 2025 total of 172,114 (history + physics categories). Based on the 2025 history category proportion of about 31.8%, the estimated 2026 history category examinees are about 53,100, slightly lower than 2025's 54,707, easing competition pressure. The university is located in Xuancheng City, Anhui Province, not a local university, so there is no local admission preference.
